de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.lemmatagenerator

Class LemmataAutoModeOptions

extends Object

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      private Collection<String> filesForAxioms

      private String internalVersion
      Contains the internal version of KeY.
      private int maxRules
      The maximum number of rules that are used within a proof.
      private String pathOfDefinitionFile 
      private String pathOfResult 
      private String pathOfRuleFile
      The path of the file containing the rules that should be proven.
      private PrintStream printStream 
      private static String PROOF_POSTFIX 
      private boolean saveResultsToFile
      If this option is activated, the resulting proofs are stored in files within the folder pathOfResult.
      private long timeout
      The time out for each proof.

      • timeout

        private long timeout
        The time out for each proof. If timeout<0 no time out is used.

      • maxRules

        private int maxRules
        The maximum number of rules that are used within a proof.

        private String pathOfResult

      • pathOfDefinitionFile

        private String pathOfDefinitionFile

      • printStream

      • internalVersion

        private final String internalVersion
        Contains the internal version of KeY. It is needed for saving proofs.

      • saveResultsToFile

        private boolean saveResultsToFile
        If this option is activated, the resulting proofs are stored in files within the folder pathOfResult.

        private String homePath
